heading: Use of facilities and services of other law enforcement agencies
label: 905 Use of facilities and services of other law enforcement agencies
text: With the permission of the head of the agency concerned, the Secretary may use the facilities and services of Federal, State, and local law enforcement agencies when it is economical and in the public interest to do so.
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 905 was renumbered .section 2305 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 218(e) of this titlePub. L. 102–83, § 2(a)Prior sections 906 to 908 and 1000 to 1010 were renumbered sections 2306 to 2308 and 2400 to 2410 of this title, respectively.
